pipeline.label: preflight
pipeline.contract: check tools, fonts, folders, and platform assumptions before edit

pipeline.label: iphone_sdr
pipeline.contract: convert HLG/HDR iPhone footage to SDR bt709 with native macOS tooling

pipeline.label: word_transcript
pipeline.contract: create word-level transcript, but mark unreliable windows for manual repair

pipeline.label: template_plan
pipeline.contract: copy a shoot template and fill source ranges plus transcript corrections

pipeline.label: stutter_review
pipeline.contract: detect long-word hidden false starts, near repeats, and intra-piece pauses

pipeline.label: render_body
pipeline.contract: scale/crop 1080x1920, add word-highlight captions as PNG overlay states

pipeline.label: identity_slots
pipeline.contract: cover, finale, music, and sticker/motif are replaceable config, not private defaults

pipeline.label: qa
pipeline.contract: review frames, color tags, subtitles, final audio, and retranscribe if needed
